name: Retroactive issue migration
description: Migrate existing issues.json entries into scope-owned finding registries. Each issue gets a layer tag (L2/L3/L4) and is moved to the appropriate owner — spec-reviews for L2 design issues, features for L3 scope conflicts, features[].findings for L4 implementation defects. Global issues.json becomes a derived view. Depends on FGAP-002 and FGAP-003 landing for proper enforcement, but can be hand-enacted in the interim.
exit_criteria: Every issue in issues.json has a layer tag or has been moved to a scope-owned registry
issues.json is either empty or contains only entries not yet classified
